title: Add Metrics Analyst Analysis to Reports and Dashboards Page
story: As a data analyst, I want to launch the Metrics Analyst analysis from the Reports & Dashboards page, so that I can discover and assign metrics directly while managing dashboards.
description:
Abstract and reuse the Metrics Analyst code so it can be launched from the Reports & Dashboards page. An 'Analyze Metrics' option is added to dashboards, launching the metrics analyst sidebar with the selected dashboard's metrics.

Goal: manage code from one place for consistency across tabs, reducing duplicate QA effort. Also serves as a demo/onboarding flow from Reports → Metrics Glossary.
acceptance_criteria: Metrics Analyst can be launched from the Reports & Dashboards page
Abstracted code is shared between Metrics tab and Reports & Dashboards tab
Analyze Metrics link appears on the Metrics tab within the Reports & Dashboards sidebar
Analysis results are consistent between both locations
ux_changes: 'Analyze Metrics' option added to Reports & Dashboards page, launching the shared Metrics Analyst sidebar.
middleware_changes: Abstracted Metrics Analyst code into a reusable module shared between Metrics Glossary and Reports & Dashboards pages.
implementation_notes: Code was abstracted from the Metrics Glossary page to be reusable. A 'Metric Analytics' link was added to the Metrics tab within the Reports & Dashboards sidebar.
comment_summary: Developer abstracted the analytics code and integrated it into the Reports & Dashboards page with a screenshot of the new Metric Analytics link.
